dc_description: A cluttered indoor room or workshop with a person seated on the left, their face blurred, wearing a light-colored shirt and holding a dark object. The space contains multiple bicycles or bicycle parts in the foreground, including handlebars, saddles, and bags. A wooden workbench or table across the back is crowded with equipment, bags, tools, and orange/black devices. A wall map hangs above the work area, and shelving with assorted containers and items is visible on the left. Bright daylight enters from a window on the right, creating strong contrast and glare.
novel_visual_observations: At least two bicycle saddles are visible in the foreground, suggesting multiple bikes stored very close together.
Several orange-and-black mechanical or electronic devices are lined up on the back table beneath a wall-mounted map.
location_name: Via Dante Alighieri, Le Coste, Montefiascone
rich_context: Poste Italiane, 19, Via Dante Alighieri, Le Mosse, Le Coste, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
